hero_subtitle: SFTY provides VASP executives and board leaders with a unified view of compliance risk and operational controls to strengthen audit readiness and support scalable decision-making.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain a clear operating view when compliance data and case information remain dispersed across multiple systems. This limits their ability to monitor risk, support audit readiness and make informed decisions with confidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance data, cases, decision logs and evidence across providers into a unified dashboard so leadership can monitor risk, track audit readiness and control operational compliance confidently.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to executive risk view
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates compliance data from multiple providers, connects cases, decisions and evidence into a unified dashboard for clear board-level risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented views. One executive dashboard
why_sfty_description: SFTY consolidates compliance data into a unified operating view that preserves decision evidence and enhances board-level risk visibility without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP executives with a secure, auditable platform that consolidates compliance evidence and orchestrates providers for scalable, enterprise-grade risk oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support board-level risk visibility for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows provide executive risk insights
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports board-level compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider data to risk dashboards
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance control layer, delivering visibility into risk, cases, rules, and evidence for digital asset businesses like VASPs and fintech clients.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY create board-level risk views?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates compliance workflows, regulatory changes and case data into dashboards tailored for board-level oversight and operational risk management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and clear traceability of compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected workflow without disrupting existing integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers, structuring their outputs into workflows, cases, regulatory updates and reports rather than replacing them.
final_title: Review board-level risk visibility with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects compliance cases, audit evidence and operational controls into one executive dashboard.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
